top.head: IQ ROBOTS
top.text-one: The first platform in the world that allows to automate binary options trading.
top.text-orange: We’d like to offer you an exclusive access
top.text-two: to the groundbreaking service prior to its reveal to the public.
top.start: LAUNCH YOUR ROBOT IN THREE STEPS
top.offline: and make transactions even when you are offline!

first.step-text: Create a robot according to your strategy or subscribe to someone else’s robot

second.step-text: Verify your robot’s functionality using historical quotes

third.step-text: Launch the robot and don't forget to check your profits

review.head: LEAVE FEEDBACK
review.review-text: Please note that this is a beta version and we are working hard to eliminate any and all possible errors. We would be very grateful if you could let us know about any problems you uncover.
